---
title: "pilot analyses"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

theme_set(theme_bw() +
            theme(panel.grid = element_blank()))
```

```{r}
manifest <- read_csv(here("data", "assets", "manifest.csv")) |> 
  filter(task_id != "sds") |> 
  mutate(item_uid = ifelse(
    row_number() >= 241 & row_number() <= 255,
    str_c(item_uid, "b"),
    item_uid
  )) |> 
  distinct()
models <- googlesheets4::read_sheet(ss = "1T3DZzlBDuSFQrZwmby-IZ4Oi2s_7JBffQeoM1bwegJc",
                          sheet = "model_info") |> 
  write_csv(here("data", "model_info.csv"))
```

```{r}
results_files <- list.files(here("results"), 
                            pattern = "*.csv", 
                            recursive = TRUE) |> 
  str_subset("(summary|checkpoint|by-type|-de/|-es/)", negate = TRUE)

all_results <- results_files |> 
  map(\(f) {
    df <- read_csv(here("results", f), show_col_types = FALSE) |> 
        mutate(filepath = f, reason = as.character(reason))
    ns <- which(df$item_uid == "ns-num-comp-10")
    if (length(ns) == 0) return(df)
    df |> 
      mutate(item_uid = ifelse(
        row_number() > ns,
        str_c(item_uid, "b"),
        item_uid
      ))
    }) |> 
  list_rbind()

all_results_join <- all_results |> 
  mutate(model = filepath |> str_remove("/.*")) |> 
  left_join(manifest, by = join_by(item_uid)) |> 
  left_join(models, by = join_by(model)) |> 
  mutate(n_params_num = map_dbl(n_params, \(n) {
    suffix = str_sub(n, -1, -1)
    (as.numeric(str_sub(n, 1, -2)) * case_when(
      suffix == "M" ~ 10^6,
      suffix == "B" ~ 10^9,
      suffix == "T" ~ 10^12
    ))
  })) |> 
  filter(!is.na(model_name))
```

```{r}
all_results_summary <- all_results_join |> 
  group_by(task, model_class, model_name, n_params_num) |> 
  summarise(accuracy = mean(is_correct),
            chance = mean(chance_level, na.rm = T),
            .groups = "drop")
```

```{r}
all_results_total <- all_results_join |> 
  group_by(model_class, model_name, n_params_num) |> 
  summarise(accuracy = mean(is_correct),
            chance = mean(chance_level, na.rm = T),
            .groups = "drop")
```

```{r}
all_results_total |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = log(n_params_num), y = accuracy, col = model_class)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point()
```

```{r}
gpt_results <- all_results_summary |> 
  filter(model_name == "GPT 5.3") |> 
  arrange(desc(accuracy))

all_results_summary |> 
  mutate(task = fct_relevel(task, gpt_results$task)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = log(n_params_num), y = accuracy)) +
  geom_smooth(aes(group = "none"), 
              method = "lm", formula = y ~ log(x),
              lty = "dashed", se = F, col = "black") +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = chance), lty = "dotted", col = "grey54") +
  geom_line(aes(col = model_class)) +
  geom_point(aes(col = model_class)) +
  facet_wrap(~ task) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = "Log parameters",
       y = "Accuracy",
       col = "Model class")
```

# Item parameters
```{r}
item_params <- list.files(here("data", "responses", "2026-04-08", "irt_models"),
                          pattern = "_item_params.csv",
                          full.names = T) |> 
  map(\(f) read_csv(f, show_col_types = F)) |> 
  list_rbind() |> 
  mutate(task_id = str_remove(item_uid, "_.*"),
         item_uid = str_replace(item_uid, "_word_", "__"),
         item_uid = ifelse(task_id == "mrot", str_remove(item_uid, "-.*"), item_uid),
         item_uid = ifelse(task_id == "tom", str_remove(item_uid, "story[0-9]_"), item_uid),
         item_uid = ifelse(task_id == "tom", str_replace(item_uid, "-2", "_"), item_uid)) |> 
  distinct()
```

```{r}
all_results_difficulty <- all_results_join |> 
  mutate(item_uid_orig = item_uid,
         item_uid = ifelse(task_id == "mrot", str_remove(item_uid, "(?<=[0-9]{3})_.*"), item_uid)) |> 
  left_join(item_params, by = join_by(task_id, item_uid)) |> 
  mutate(is_correct = as.numeric(is_correct))
```

```{r}
all_results_difficulty |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = difficulty, y = is_correct, col = model_name)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .01) +
  geom_smooth(aes(group = model_name), 
              method = "glm", method.args = list(family = "binomial"),
              se = F) +
  facet_wrap(~ task) +
  labs(x = "Difficulty",
       y = "Accuracy",
       col = "Model")
```

```{r}
cor_results <- all_results_difficulty |> 
  group_by(task, model_name, model_class, n_params_num) |> 
  summarise(cor = cor(is_correct, difficulty, use = "pairwise.complete.obs"),
            .groups = "drop")
```

```{r}
cor_results |> 
  mutate(task = fct_relevel(task, gpt_results$task)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = log(n_params_num), y = cor)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty = "dotted", col = "grey54") +
  geom_smooth(aes(group = "none"), 
              method = "lm", formula = y ~ log(x),
              lty = "dashed", se = F, col = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(col = model_class)) +
  geom_point(aes(col = model_class)) +
  facet_wrap(~ task) +
  # coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.5, .5)) +
  labs(x = "Log parameters",
       y = "Accuracy-item difficulty correlation",
       col = "Model class")
```
